title: Dolichopentas lindenioides
taxonomy: Dolichopentas lindenioides is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae. This family is part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms, which are characterized by the production of flowers and seeds. The Pedaliaceae family is a small group of plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. Dolichopentas lindenioides is a herbaceous plant, meaning it grows in the form of a non-woody stem. It is classified within the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all types of plants.
